title: Mildly Smoky Norwegian Pork Skewers
description: Tender Norwegian pork skewers with a mildly smoky flavor, featuring white sauerkraut and a hint of char-grill, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper
Add the pork pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture
Thread the pork pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Brush the skewers with olive oil
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through
While the pork is cooking, heat the white sauerkraut in a saucepan over medium heat
Serve the pork skewers with the heated white sauerkraut and garnish with chopped fresh parsley
